summary: Phase C P3 - Drag-and-drop on Kanban recruiting board using @dnd-kit/core. All drag-and-drop flows tested and passed. Board state restored to Watch List after testing.
critical_code_review_comments: Color label picker (data-testid=color-label-red) only renders on card hover (showColors state). Not directly queryable without hover simulation — acceptable UX behavior but test scripts must hover before querying.
seed_data_creation: Card moved back to Watch List after all tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase C P3 drag-and-drop fully verified. Board uses @dnd-kit/core with useDraggable+useDroppable. Drag handle: data-testid=drag-handle-{uuid}. PATCH endpoint: /api/coach/players/{user_id}/save with {list_name}. All 5 default columns present. Daniel Orodje back in Watch List after testing. TouchSensor delay:200ms confirmed in code.

test_results.drag_handle_present: PASS - drag-handle-{uuid} testid found on every board card
test_results.drop_here_placeholder: PASS - 4 empty columns show 'Drop here' text
test_results.all_toolbar_buttons: PASS - view-toggle-table, export-csv-btn, print-board-btn, add-custom-list-btn all found
test_results.drag_watch_to_priority: PASS - card moved Watch List → Priority Targets (column count updated, persisted)
test_results.drag_to_empty_column: PASS - card moved to Contacted (empty column), PATCH called, Drop here disappeared, count updated to 1
test_results.drag_back_to_watch_list: PASS - card dragged back from Contacted → Watch List, PATCH called
test_results.persistence_after_reload: PASS - card in Watch List (1) after page reload
test_results.backend_patch_called: PASS - PATCH /api/coach/players/{id}/save called on each drag
test_results.visual_dragoverlay: PASS - ghost card visible with shadow styling during drag (confirmed in screenshots)
test_results.opacity_during_drag: PASS - original card position shows semi-transparent (isDragging state: opacity 0.35 in code)
test_results.touch_sensor_configured: PASS - TouchSensor delay:200ms tolerance:8 confirmed in CoachBoardPage.js line 410
test_results.table_view_toggle: PASS - Table view shows rows after toggle click
test_results.drop_zone_highlight_isOver: PASS - DroppableColumn applies ring-2 ring-blue-500/50 when isOver (confirmed in code line 179)
